name: Dusky Cap
short_description: Dusky Cap is a 2D hack-and-slash game.
detailed_description:
In this fun and casual game, you play as the protagonist 'Little Grey Hood,' embarking on an endless adventure to slay monsters! Continuously defeat enemies to gain EXP, unlock diverse skills upon leveling up, and enjoy the exhilarating thrill of mowing down hordes of foes!"

Game Features:

  • 30+ Unique Skills – New choices with every level-up, endless strategic possibilities!Includes
    magic circles, spinning blades, etc...

  • Dynamic Strategy: Selects the most suitable skill based on Little Grey Hat's current status.

  • One-Handed Play – Simple controls, easy to pick up anytime, anywhere!

  • Lightweight – Small file size, low price, start playing in an instant!
